title: Wall Street Analysts See a 36% Upside in Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
text: The consensus price target hints at a 36.2% upside potential for Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.

title: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) Just Reclaimed the 200-Day Moving Average
text: Good things could be on the horizon when a stock surpasses the 200-day simple moving average. How should investors react?

title: These Stocks Will Benefit From A Stronger Dollar
text: Inflation is unlikely to come down anytime soon, and the U.S. dollar is seen as a currency with the least risk among large developed countries, which is likely to result in the dollar heading higher for the foreseeable future.

title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend and Timing of Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: HOUSTON, July 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced its quarterly dividend on common shares with respect to the second quarter of 2022.
